phrases.intent_en: Ask where the peacock enclosure is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o recinto dos pavões?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee esh-TAH oo reh-SEEN-too doos pah-VOYNGSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Peacocks roam freely, but the main enclosure is adjacent to the lake area.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, perto do Lago dos Cisnes.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DOO LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh.

responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DOO LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, perto do Lago dos Cisnes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the D. Pedro V statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde está exatamente a estátua do D. Pedro V?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AH SHTAH-toouh DOO DEH. PEHD-roo VEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Historical monuments are often placed at the terminus of main avenues.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica ao fundo do jardim.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW FOONNG-doo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at the back of the garden.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at the back of the garden.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW FOONNG-doo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica ao fundo do jardim.

phrases.text_local: como chegar ao recinto dos pavões?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR OW reh-SEEN-too DOOSH puh-VOHNYSH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Recinto dos Pavões.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW reh-SEEN-too DOOSH puh-VOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Peacock Enclosure.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Peacock Enclosure.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW reh-SEEN-too DOOSH puh-VOHNYSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Recinto dos Pavões.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the peacock enclosure is
phrases.text_local: Sabe indicar a localização do recinto dos pavões?
phrases.cultural_note: Garden staff rely on botanical landmarks for clear wayfinding.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado das roseiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DUHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's next to the rose garden.

responses.english: Good morning, it's next to the rose garden.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DUHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica ao lado das roseiras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Swan Lake is located
phrases.text_local: Pode dizer-me onde fica o Lago dos Cisnes?
phrases.pronunciation: poh-DEH dee-ZAIR-mee ON-dee FI-kah oo LAH-goo doosh(liaison)-SIS-neesh
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff value directness. The gardens are expansive, so referencing the main viewpoint is standard.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao miradouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's near the viewpoint.

responses.english: Good morning, it's near the viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto ao miradouro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the D. Pedro V statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estátua de D. Pedro V?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SHTAH-toouh DIH DEH. PEHD-roo VEH?
phrases.cultural_note: The statue is a prominent landmark, often used as a meeting point.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no topo do jardim.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the top of the garden.

responses.english: Good morning, at the top of the garden.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
responses.french: Bom dia, no topo do jardim.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the summer concert box office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira dos concertos de verão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOOSH koong-SEH-ruh-toosh DIH vih-ROWN?
phrases.cultural_note: Seasonal event counters are temporarily stationed near performance stages.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira dos concertos de verão.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOOSH koong-SEH-ruh-toosh DIH vih-ROWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the summer concert box office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the summer concert box office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOOSH koong-SEH-ruh-toosh DIH vih-ROWN.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a bilheteira dos concertos de verão.

phrases.text_local: Pode explicar onde fica o Lago dos Cisnes?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih ehsp-lee-KAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Municipal gardens use color-coded signage for key attractions.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas azuis.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh uh-ZOOEESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the blue signs.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the blue signs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh uh-ZOOEESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas azuis.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Jardim das Rosas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH ROH-zuhsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim das Rosas, perto do Lago dos Cisnes.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH ROH-zuhsh, PEHR-too DOO LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rose Garden, near Swan Lake.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rose Garden, near Swan Lake.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH ROH-zuhsh, PEHR-too DOO LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Jardim das Rosas, perto do Lago dos Cisnes.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Jardim das Roseiras?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim das Roseiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rose Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rose Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Jardim das Roseiras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Casa de Chá terrace is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica o terraço da Casa de Chá?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DUH KAH-zuh DIH SHAH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Casa de Chá terrace is a popular spot for tea and views of the Douro River.

likely_response.local: Ao lado do roseiral, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DOO roo-zay-RAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the rose garden, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the rose garden, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DOO roo-zay-RAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Ao lado do roseiral, à direita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Casa de Chá terrace is
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao terraço da Casa de Chá?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo ow te-RAH-soo dah KAH-zah jee SHAH
phrases.cultural_note: Tea house terraces in Porto parks are typically positioned near water features.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é ao lado do lago.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH OW LAH-doo DOO LAH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's next to the lake.

responses.english: Good morning, it's next to the lake.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH OW LAH-doo DOO LAH-goo.
responses.french: Bom dia, é ao lado do lago.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rose Garden is
phrases.cultural_note: The formal rose beds are traditionally aligned with the historic staircases.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Roseiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rose Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rose Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Roseiras.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a estátua de D. Pedro V.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Swan Lake is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Lago dos Cisnes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Rose Garden (Roseiras) is a stable landmark that leads toward the lake.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Lago dos Cisnes.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Swan Lake.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Swan Lake.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-goo DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Lago dos Cisnes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the Rose Garden
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, como chego ao Jardim das Roseiras?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH roo-ZAY-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Rose Garden, or 'Roseiras', is a charming area with many rose bushes, popular for strolls and photos.

likely_response.local: Ao fundo do jardim, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the bottom of the garden, on the right.

responses.english: At the bottom of the garden, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Ao fundo do jardim, à direita.
